message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Client" as client
rectangle "Game" as game
package "Player" #LightBlue {
}

client -> game : getScoreInformation()
activate game
game -> Player : __toString()
activate Player
Player --> game : return $name
deactivate Player
game -->> client : Score Information
deactivate game

@enduml
```
